description_long: This is a single wooden bed with a simple, modern platform frame and a tall, rectangular headboard. The frame is constructed from a medium-toned wood, giving it a sturdy and minimalist appearance. The bed is topped with a black mattress and a colorful comforter featuring an anime-style character with long blue hair and a blue dress. The bedding drapes slightly over the sides, adding a touch of softness to the otherwise angular design. The foot of the bed is plain, with no footboard, and the overall construction appears solid and functional. The bed is suitable for a single occupant and would fit well in a contemporary urban setting.
description: A single wooden platform bed with a tall headboard and anime-themed comforter, featuring a minimalist and sturdy design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wooden frame, the tall headboard, and the anime-themed comforter draped over the mattress.
description_view_1: Head-on view of the headboard, highlighting its height and plain wooden surface, with the bedding just visible at the top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the bed's length, headboard, and the comforter with the anime character.
description_view_3: Foot view showing the end of the bed, the absence of a footboard, and the anime character on the comforter facing forward.
